title: Connected Boards not Mirroring Data
excerpt: I’ve connected two boards and created mirror columns, but for some reason, the information from the source board isn’t pulling to the connected board. I’ve looked at all of the help articles, and I can’t figure out what’…

posts.author: swilhel2 (Shaylyn Wilhelm)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve connected two boards and created mirror columns, but for some reason, the information from the source board isn’t pulling to the connected board. I’ve looked at all of the help articles, and I can’t figure out what’s going wrong. Has anyone run into this issue, and if so, how did you solve it?

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Shaylyn,

Harsh here from Fario Consulting

This might be related to permission settings.
Could you ensure that the you have the necessary access and permissions to all involved boards

Harsh
